pipelines.description: Full catalogue refresh using the parallel worker pool.

artifacts.description: Cached repository metadata fetched from GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket/Codeberg APIs.
Working tree containing shallow clones of each module repository.
Cache of module clones from the previous run; recycled by the pipeline to avoid full re-clones.
Resized module screenshots exported for the public catalogue.
Final module catalogue powering downstream consumers.
Minified variant of the module catalogue.
Modules that failed processing (e.g. inaccessible repositories), displayed separately on the website.
Human-readable issue breakdown generated from the latest in-memory analysis payload and published stats.

stages.name: Collect Metadata
stages.description: Unified stage: Fetch module list from Wiki and enrich with repository metadata.

inputs.description: Authoritative list of community modules maintained in the MagicMirror wiki.

sideEffects.description: Fetches Wiki and makes API calls to GitHub/GitLab/etc.

environment.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environment.description: Personal access token used to increase API rate limits.

stages.name: Parallel module processing
stages.description: Clone, enrich, and analyze modules in parallel using the worker pool.

sideEffects.description: Creates/updates module clones in modules/ and modules_temp/.
Generates resized module screenshots in website/images/.
Spawns worker processes for parallel module processing.
Git operations and npm commands may access external resources.

stages.name: Aggregate catalogue outputs
stages.description: Build final published catalogue outputs from the in-memory analysis payload.

sideEffects.description: Writes final published catalogue and stats JSON artifacts.

stages.name: Generate result markdown
stages.description: Render website/result.md from the in-memory analysis payload and published stats.

sideEffects.description: Writes the published result markdown page for module issue review.
